ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used in the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the project was last updated */,
  "version_control_system" TEXT /* Version control system used */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the issue was detected */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the issue (e.g., code style, security vulnerability) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., blocker, critical, info) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "line" INTEGER /* Line number where the issue was detected */,
  "column" INTEGER /* Column number where the issue was detected */,
  "end_line" INTEGER /* End line number of the issue */,
  "end_column" INTEGER /* End column number of the issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Labels associated with the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user last logged in */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's avatar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the interaction */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the interaction occurred */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue related to the interaction */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, resolve) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction */,
  "data" TEXT /* Additional data associated with the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the metric was calculated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., cyclomatic complexity, Halstead complexity) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metric was calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metric was last updated */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the rule (e.g., code style, security vulnerability) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the rule (e.g., blocker, critical, info) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the rule was last updated */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rule_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rule that was executed */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the rule was executed */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue detected by the rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result was last updated */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Additional data associated with the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_results_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_results_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_results_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES rules ("rule_id")
)
